Container.Name: ScriptWatch
Container.Overview: ScriptWatch Standalone central API and web UI. Manages scripts, schedules jobs, and dispatches them to agents without requiring PostgreSQL or Gitea. SQLite data and local script snapshots are stored under /app/data.
Container.Requires: Use a unique Agent Token and Secret Key for every install. Map /app/data to persistent appdata storage.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent SQLite database and local script snapshot storage.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container. Keep this default unless you know you need a custom SQLite path.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Container data directory. This should match the App Data container path.

Config.Name: Script Store Directory
Config.Description: Local script source and version snapshot directory inside the container.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: URL agents use to reach this ScriptWatch instance. Use your Unraid host IP, hostname, or reverse proxy URL.

Config.Name: Agent Token
Config.Description: Shared secret agents use to authenticate with this API. Generate a long random value and use the same value in agent configs.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Flask session secret. Generate a long random value and keep it private.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional initial web UI password. Leave blank to set it from Settings after first launch.

Config.Name: Admin API Token
Config.Description: Optional bearer token for API access. You can also generate this later in Settings.

Config.Name: ntfy URL
Config.Description: Optional ntfy endpoint URL. Leave blank to disable ntfy notifications.

Config.Name: Discord Webhook URL
Config.Description: Optional Discord webhook URL. Leave blank to disable Discord notifications.

Config.Name: Missed Run Grace Minutes
Config.Description: Grace period before a scheduled run is considered missed.

Config.Name: Job Retention Days
Config.Description: Number of days to keep completed job history.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the ScriptWatch web dashboard.
